# Stardust Design System

> Xplor design system: tokens + components, documented as a no-build static site.
> These machine-readable files are derived from the source CSS and doc pages — prefer
> them over scraping the demo-heavy HTML. Regenerate with `node scripts/build-component-api.mjs`.

## Components

- [Accordion](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/accordion.json): `.ds-accordion` — v1.0.0. Docs: https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/components/accordion.html
- [Avatar](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/avatar.json): `.ds-avatar` — v1.2.0. Docs: https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/components/avatar.html
- [Bottom Sheet](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/bottom-sheet.json): `.ds-sheet` — v1.3.0. Docs: https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/components/bottom-sheet.html
- [Button](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/button.json): `.ds-btn` — v1.3.0. Docs: https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/components/button.html
- [Calendar](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/calendar.json): `.ds-calendar` — v1.0.0. Docs: https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/components/calendar.html
- [Card](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/card.json): `.ds-card` — v1.2.0. Docs: https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/components/card.html
- [Checkbox](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/checkbox.json): `.ds-checkbox` — v1.3.0. Docs: https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/components/checkbox.html
- [Datatable](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/datatable.json): `.ds-datatable` — v1.0.0. Docs: https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/components/datatable.html
- [Date Picker](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/date-picker.json): `.ds-datepicker` — v1.0.0. Docs: https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/components/date-picker.html
- [Dialog](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/dialog.json): `.ds-dialog` — v1.0.0. Docs: https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/components/dialog.html
- [FAB](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/fab.json): `.ds-fab` — v1.2.0. Docs: https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/components/fab.html
- [File Upload](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/file-upload.json): `.ds-fileupload` — v1.0.0. Docs: https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/components/file-upload.html
- [Input](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/input.json): `.ds-input` — v1.4.0. Docs: https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/components/input.html
- [Menu](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/menu.json): `.ds-menu` — v1.0.0. Docs: https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/components/menu.html
- [Message Box](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/message-box.json): `.ds-message` — v1.0.0. Docs: https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/components/message-box.html
- [Pill](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/pill.json): `.ds-pill` — v1.3.0. Docs: https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/components/pill.html
- [Radio Button](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/radio-button.json): `.ds-radio` — v1.2.0. Docs: https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/components/radio-button.html
- [Selection Pill](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/selection-pill.json): `.ds-selection` — v1.1.0. Docs: https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/components/selection-pill.html
- [Tabs](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/tabs.json): `.ds-tabs` — v1.0.0. Docs: https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/components/tabs.html
- [Time Picker](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/time-picker.json): `.ds-timepicker` — v1.0.0. Docs: https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/components/time-picker.html
- [Title Block](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/title-block.json): `.ds-title` — v1.3.0. Docs: https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/components/title-block.html
- [Toast](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/toast.json): `.ds-toast` — v1.0.0. Docs: https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/components/toast.html
- [Toggle](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/toggle.json): `.ds-toggle` — v1.2.0. Docs: https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/components/toggle.html
- [Tooltip](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/tooltip.json): `.ds-tooltip` — v1.0.0. Docs: https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/components/tooltip.html

## Machine-readable

- [Component index](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/api/index.json): catalogue of all components
- [Design tokens (DTCG)](https://masonmaddy.github.io/stardust4/tokens/stardust.tokens.json): full token set in W3C DTCG format
